node.text: John and his friends were teammates for four years in high school and have played together for quite some time.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "team trip avoid") on Session 9 (Score: 0.55)

node.text: John is considering Edinburgh, Scotland for the team trip based on Tim's suggestion.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "team trip avoid") on Session 11 (Score: 0.52)

node.text: John had a major challenge when he hurt his ankle last season and had to undergo physical therapy.
John plans to use his platform post-basketball to make a positive difference, potentially by starting a foundation and doing charity work to leave a meaningful legacy.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "team trip avoid") on Session 11 (Score: 0.52)

node.text: John offers to help Tim out when he plans to visit NYC.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "team trip avoid") on Session 9 (Score: 0.55)

node.text: John is supportive of Tim and offers help whenever needed.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "team trip avoid") on Session 9 (Score: 0.55)

node.text: John is open to receiving support and advice from others, like Tim.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "team trip avoid") on Session 11 (Score: 0.52)

node.text: John is focusing on improving shooting and making a greater impact on the court. He is also working on building his brand and seeking more endorsements for life after basketball.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "team trip avoid") on Session 11 (Score: 0.52)

node.text: John has been playing professional basketball for just under a year.
John is planning a team trip with his friends to explore a new city next month.
